role.name: Analyst
role.description: Intuitive (N) and Thinking (T) personality types, known for their rationality, impartiality and intellectual excellence.
role.description_zh: 直觉型(N)和思考型(T)人格类型，以理性、公正和卓越智力著称。

strategy.name: Confident Individualism
strategy.description: These personality types prefer to do things by themselves, choosing to rely on their own skills and instincts instead of seeking help from others. They are confident, even-tempered and resistant to stress. They refuse to worry too much and do not push themselves too hard when it comes to achieving goals.
strategy.description_zh: 这些人格类型喜欢独自做事，选择依靠自己的技能和本能，而不是寻求他人帮助。他们自信、情绪稳定且抗压力强。他们拒绝过度担忧，在追求目标时不会过分逼迫自己。

introverted.name: Introverted
introverted.description: Individuals prefer solitary activities and get exhausted by social interaction. They tend to be quite sensitive to external stimulation (e.g. sound, sight or smell) in general.
introverted.description_zh: 内向型个体偏好独处活动，社交互动后容易感到疲惫。他们通常对外部刺激（如声音、视觉或气味）相当敏感。

intuitive.name: Intuitive
intuitive.description: Individuals are very imaginative, open-minded and curious. They prefer novelty over stability and focus on hidden meanings and future possibilities.
intuitive.description_zh: 直觉型个体富有想象力、思想开放且充满好奇心。他们更喜欢新奇而非稳定，关注隐藏的含义和未来的可能性。

thinking.name: Thinking
thinking.description: Individuals focus on objectivity and rationality, prioritizing logic over emotions. They tend to hide their feelings and see efficiency as more important than cooperation.
thinking.description_zh: 思考型个体注重客观性和理性，优先考虑逻辑而非情感。他们往往隐藏自己的感受，将效率看得比合作更重要。

judging.name: Judging
judging.description: Individuals are decisive, thorough and highly organized. They value clarity, predictability and closure, preferring structure and planning to spontaneity.
judging.description_zh: 判断型个体果断、彻底且高度有条理。他们重视清晰、可预测性和完结，更喜欢结构和规划而非自发性。

assertive.name: Assertive
assertive.description: Individuals are self-assured, even-tempered and resistant to stress. They refuse to worry too much and do not push themselves too hard when it comes to achieving goals.
assertive.description_zh: 果断型个体自信、情绪稳定且抗压力强。他们拒绝过度担忧，在追求目标时不会过分逼迫自己。

strengths.name: Rational
strengths.description: Architects take pride in their minds. For them, nearly any situation can become an opportunity to expand their knowledge and hone their rational thinking skills.
strengths.description_zh: 建筑师以头脑为荣。对他们来说，几乎任何情况都可以成为扩展知识和磨练理性思维技能的机会。

strengths.name: Independent
strengths.description: For these personality types, conformity is more or less synonymous with mediocrity. Creative and self-motivated, Architects strive to do things their own way.
strengths.description_zh: 对于这些人格类型，从众或多或少等同于平庸。富有创造力和自我激励，建筑师努力以自己的方式做事。

strengths.name: Determined
strengths.description: Architects are ambitious and goal-oriented. They have a clear vision of what success means to them, and few things can stop them from turning these visions into reality.
strengths.description_zh: 建筑师雄心勃勃、目标明确。他们对成功意味着什么有清晰的愿景，很少有事情能阻止他们将这些愿景变为现实。

strengths.name: Curious
strengths.description: Architects are open to new ideas – as long as they're backed by sound reasoning. They're particularly drawn to complex, nonconventional ideas. And when they're proven wrong, they may even be willing to change their minds.
strengths.description_zh: 建筑师对新思想持开放态度——只要它们有充分的理由支持。他们特别被复杂、非传统的想法所吸引。而且当事实证明他们错了时，他们甚至愿意改变主意。

weaknesses.name: Arrogant
weaknesses.description: Architects are knowledgeable, but they're not infallible. Their self-assurance can blind them to useful input from others – especially from those they consider to be intellectually inferior.
weaknesses.description_zh: 建筑师知识渊博，但并非万无一失。他们的自信可能使他们忽视他人的有用意见——特别是那些他们认为智力不如自己的人。

weaknesses.name: Dismissive of Emotions
weaknesses.description: For Architects, rationality is king. They may grow impatient with anyone who seems to value emotion over fact. This can be particularly problematic in personal relationships.
weaknesses.description_zh: 对建筑师来说，理性是王道。他们可能对任何似乎重视情感胜过事实的人变得不耐烦。这在个人关系中可能特别成问题。

weaknesses.name: Combative
weaknesses.description: Architects hate blindly following anything without understanding why. This personality type can get stuck in arguments over useless rules and regulations, which can create unnecessary conflict.
weaknesses.description_zh: 建筑师讨厌在不了解原因的情况下盲目遵循任何事物。这种人格类型可能陷入对无用规则和规定的争论中，这可能造成不必要的冲突。

weaknesses.name: Romantically Clueless
weaknesses.description: Architects' relentless rationality can lead them to become frustrated with romance, particularly in the early stages of a relationship. They may have difficulty understanding what's going on and how they should act.
weaknesses.description_zh: 建筑师无情的理性可能导致他们对浪漫感到沮丧，特别是在关系的早期阶段。他们可能难以理解正在发生什么以及该如何表现。

research_insight.title: Research Insight
research_insight.content: Turbulent Architects are the most likely personality type to frequently feel misunderstood.
research_insight.content_zh: 动荡型建筑师是最有可能经常感到被误解的人格类型。
